## Summary

What this PR changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (skill / command / agent / module / template)
- [ ] Validator or detector change
- [ ] Docs / standards
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally (validator + detector + e2e).
- [ ] `node scripts/check-docs.mjs docs --strict` passes (this repo's own docs).
- [ ] New skills use a triggering-only `description` (no workflow summary).
- [ ] If I changed the scaffold/templates, a freshly assembled tree still validates (covered by the e2e suite).
- [ ] Docs/standards updated if behavior changed.

## Notes for reviewers

Anything that needs special attention.
